name: Calendar
description: A flexible calendar component that allows users to view, select, and manage dates. Supports single and multiple date selection, controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max constraints, unavailable dates, and multiple display modes (days, months, quarters, years).
when_to_use: When you need a standalone visual calendar for date selection
When users need to select a single date or multiple individual dates
When you need to display and navigate through months, quarters, or years
When integrating into a booking or scheduling UI without a text input field
avoid: Do not use for selecting a date range with start/end — use RangeCalendar instead
Do not use when you need a text input combined with a popup calendar — use DatePicker instead

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Whether single or multiple selection is enabled.

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value of the calendar.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the calendar.

props.name: mode
props.description: Controlled display mode.

props.name: defaultMode
props.description: Initial display mode for uncontrolled component.

props.name: modes
props.default: {days: true, months: true, quarters: false, years: true}
props.description: Modes available to the user.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the calendar value is immutable.

props.name: focusedValue
props.description: Controlled focused date in the calendar view.

props.name: defaultFocusedValue
props.description: The date that is focused when the calendar first mounts (uncontrolled).

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback called for each date; if returns true, the date is unavailable.

props.name: isWeekend
props.description: Callback called for each date; if returns true, the date is treated as a weekend.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone of the value.

props.name: onUpdateMode
props.description: Fires when the display mode is changed.

props.name: onFocusUpdate
props.description: Fires when the focused date changes.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Whether the calendar should receive focus on mount.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the wrapper element.

name: DateField
description: A versatile text input field specifically designed for date and time entry. Renders individual editable segments (day, month, year, etc.) within a TextInput, supports format customization, validation states, and optional clear button. Controlled or uncontrolled.
when_to_use: When you need an inline text-style date/time input without a popup calendar
When building forms that require structured date entry with segment-by-segment editing
When you need a date input with label, clear button, or validation state
When you need to compose a date input with adjacent form elements using pin
avoid: Do not use for date range input — use RangeDateField instead
Do not use when you want a popup calendar alongside the input — use DatePicker instead
Do not use for relative date expressions like 'now-1d' — use RelativeDateField instead

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed by the user.

props.name: format
props.description: Format of the date when rendered. Uses day.js format tokens.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: view
props.description: The visual style of the control.

props.name: pin
props.description: Corner rounding style for combining with adjacent controls.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the component value is immutable.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state that triggers the error appearance.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text displayed below the component.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Shows the clear icon button.

props.name: label
props.description: Help text rendered to the left of the input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is set.

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: Controls default segment values when the user first interacts.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that marks a date as unavailable.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone of the value.

props.name: parseDateFromString
props.type: ((dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime)
props.description: Custom parser function for pasted date strings.

props.name: startContent
props.description: Content rendered before the label and input.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Content rendered after the input and clear button.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the wrapper element.

name: DatePicker
description: A fully-featured date picker combining a DateField text input with a popup Calendar. Supports date and time selection, custom format, validation, mobile-responsive layout, and custom calendar via children render prop. Controlled or uncontrolled.
when_to_use: When users need to type or pick a date from a popup calendar
When building forms that require both keyboard entry and visual calendar selection
When you need date/time selection with format control and validation state
When a mobile-friendly date picker is needed
avoid: Do not use for selecting a date range — use RangeDatePicker instead
Do not use when you need only a calendar without a text input — use Calendar instead
Do not use for relative date expressions — use RelativeDatePicker instead

name: RangeCalendar
description: A calendar component for selecting a date range with a start and end date. Shares the same display modes and props as Calendar but its value is a RangeValue containing start and end DateTime objects. Controlled or uncontrolled.
when_to_use: When users need to visually select a start and end date from a calendar grid
When building booking or scheduling UIs that require a date range without a text input
When you need a standalone range calendar component to embed in custom layouts
avoid: Do not use for selecting a single date — use Calendar instead
Do not use when you need a text input with a popup — use RangeDatePicker instead

props.description: The controlled value as a range with start and end.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value changes.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the calendar.

props.name: mode
props.description: Controlled display mode.

props.name: defaultMode
props.description: Initial display mode for uncontrolled component.

props.description: The maximum allowed date.

props.description: Indicates the user cannot interact with the control.

props.description: Whether the calendar value is immutable.

props.description: Controlled focused date in the calendar view.

props.name: defaultFocusedValue
props.description: The date focused when the calendar first mounts.

name: RangeDateField
description: A text input field for entering a date range as start and end values. Renders within a single TextInput with a configurable delimiter between the two date segments. Extends DateField props and accepts RangeValue<DateTime> as its value type.
when_to_use: When users need to type a date range directly in a text input without a popup
When building filter UIs that require compact inline range input
When composing a custom range date picker with a separate calendar component
avoid: Do not use when you need a popup calendar alongside the range input — use RangeDatePicker instead
Do not use for single date input — use DateField instead

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value as a range with start and end.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed.

props.name: delimiter
props.description: Delimiter separating the start and end parts of the range.

props.name: format
props.description: Format of the date when rendered. Uses day.js format tokens.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: view
props.description: The visual style of the control.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the component value is immutable.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state that triggers the error appearance.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone of the value.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

name: RangeDatePicker
description: A date range picker combining a RangeDateField text input with a popup RangeCalendar. Allows users to select start and end dates either by typing or choosing from a calendar popup. Supports time selection, validation, and a custom calendar via children render prop.
when_to_use: When users need to select a start and end date via a popup calendar or typed input
When building filter or report UIs requiring a date range with both typing and visual selection
When you need date range input with validation and format customization
avoid: Do not use for single date selection — use DatePicker instead
Do not use for relative date ranges like 'last 7 days' — use RelativeRangeDatePicker instead

name: RangeDateSelection
description: A visual timeline-style range selector that renders a draggable ruler with a selection interval. Users can drag the selection to move or resize it along a continuous time axis. Designed for analytics and monitoring dashboards where users need to zoom and pan time ranges.
when_to_use: When users need to visually drag and resize a time interval on a continuous timeline
In analytics, monitoring, or observability dashboards with zoomable time windows
When you need scale buttons to expand or contract the selected time range
avoid: Do not use for standard date/time form input — use DatePicker or RangeDatePicker instead
Do not use when the primary interaction is typing dates — use RangeDateField instead

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled selection range.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial selection range for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the selection range changes.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date for the selection.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date for the selection.

props.name: minDuration
props.description: Minimum duration of the selection in milliseconds.

props.name: maxDuration
props.description: Maximum duration of the selection in milliseconds.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the selection in milliseconds.

props.name: numberOfIntervals
props.description: Number of selection intervals that fit into the ruler.

props.name: placeOnRuler
props.description: Relative position of the selection on the ruler (0–1).

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Time zone used to show values.

props.name: displayNow
props.description: Whether to display a 'now' line on the ruler.

props.name: draggableRuler
props.description: Enables dragging the entire ruler to pan the view.

props.name: hasScaleButtons
props.description: Shows plus/minus buttons for scaling the selection.

props.name: scaleButtonsPosition
props.description: Position of the scale buttons.

props.name: formatTime
props.description: Custom formatter for time tick labels.

props.name: renderAdditionalRulerContent
props.description: Renders additional SVG content inside the ruler.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

name: RelativeDateField
description: A text input field that accepts relative date expressions using Grafana-like syntax (e.g. 'now-1d', 'now/w'). The value is a string formula rather than a DateTime object. An optional popup can display the resolved absolute date on a calendar.
when_to_use: When users need to enter relative date expressions like 'now-1d' or 'now/M'
In analytics, monitoring, or Grafana-like UIs where relative time ranges are common
When the date value needs to be stored as a reusable formula rather than an absolute timestamp
avoid: Do not use for absolute date input — use DateField or DatePicker instead
Do not use for date range input — use RelativeDatePicker with a range or RelativeRangeDatePicker

props.description: The controlled value as a relative date formula string.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed.

props.name: hasTime
props.description: Shows a time field in the popup alongside the calendar.

props.description: Validation state that triggers the error appearance.

props.description: Error text displayed below the component.

props.description: Shows the clear icon button.

name: RelativeDatePicker
description: A date picker that supports both absolute and relative date values. Users can switch between absolute mode (behaves like DatePicker) and relative mode (accepts Grafana-like formulas) via a mode toggle button. Value is typed as either a DateTime or a relative string.
when_to_use: When users need to pick either absolute or relative dates from the same field
In analytics or monitoring dashboards where relative time offsets like 'now-1h' are needed
When you want a DatePicker extended with Grafana-style relative formula support
avoid: Do not use for a simple absolute date picker — use DatePicker instead for less complexity
Do not use for relative date range selection — use RelativeRangeDatePicker instead

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value. Value is {type: 'absolute', value: DateTime} or {type: 'relative', value: string}.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed.

props.name: format
props.description: Format for the absolute date display.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: view
props.description: The visual style of the control.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the component value is immutable.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state that triggers the error appearance.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text displayed below the component.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Shows the clear icon button.

props.name: label
props.description: Help text rendered to the left of the input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is set.

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: Controls default segment values when the user first interacts.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed absolute date.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed absolute date.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that marks a date as unavailable in absolute mode.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone of the value.

props.name: children
props.description: Render prop for a custom calendar component.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Handler called when the popup open state changes.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

name: RelativeRangeDatePicker
description: A comprehensive date range picker supporting both absolute and relative date values for start and end. Features a dialog with form inputs, preset tabs, timezone selector, and optional apply button. Designed for analytics and monitoring UIs where Grafana-style relative ranges like 'now-1h' to 'now' are standard.
when_to_use: When users need to select a date range that can be either absolute or relative (e.g. 'last 7 days')
In analytics and monitoring dashboards with Grafana-style time range controls
When preset time ranges (last 1h, 1d, 1w) are needed alongside custom input
When timezone selection is required as part of the range picker
avoid: Do not use for simple absolute date range selection — use RangeDatePicker instead
Do not use for single date picking — use RelativeDatePicker instead

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value with start and end, each being absolute or relative.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value changes. Receives the new value and current time zone.

props.name: format
props.description: Format for absolute date display.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the component value is immutable.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state that triggers the error appearance.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text displayed on the control.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date.

props.name: withApplyButton
props.description: Show an apply button to confirm changes in the dialog.

props.name: withZonesList
props.description: Show a timezone selector in the dialog.

props.name: withPresets
props.description: Show relative range presets in the dialog.

props.name: applyPresetsImmediately
props.description: Apply preset selections immediately without the apply button.

props.name: withHeader
props.description: Show a header with docs tooltip in the dialog.

props.name: presetTabs
props.description: Custom preset tabs to replace the default presets.

props.name: docs
props.description: Custom docs for the picker. Pass an empty array to hide docs.

props.name: allowNullableValues
props.description: Whether start or end can be null independently.

props.name: alwaysShowAsAbsolute
props.description: Show selected relative values as absolute dates in the control.

props.name: getRangeTitle
props.type: ((value: RangeValue<Value | null> | null, timeZone: string) => string)
props.description: Custom formatter for the displayed range title.

props.name: renderControl
props.description: Render prop for a fully custom trigger control.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Handler called when the dialog open state changes.

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: Placeholder date for segment defaults.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that marks a date as unavailable.

props.name: className
props.description: The wrapper element class name.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the wrapper element.
